ws_auto_connect.message0: Weather station automatically connects to WiFi AP name %1
ws_auto_connect.tooltip: Load WiFi configuration from NVS and automatically connect. If failed, open AP configuration hotspot.

ws_config_loop.tooltip: Process DNS and HTTP requests in configuration mode and need to be placed in a loop

ws_is_config_mode.tooltip: Determine whether you are currently in WiFi configuration (AP) mode

ws_fetch_weather.tooltip: Get the latest weather data from yytianqi API

ws_fetch_weather_result.tooltip: Get weather data from API and return whether it is successful

ws_get_ip.tooltip: Get the local IP address after WiFi connection

ws_save_config.message0: Save WiFi configuration SSID %1 Password %2 API Key %3 City %4
ws_save_config.tooltip: Manually save WiFi and weather API configuration to NVS
